---
title: "Precios del plÃ¡tano en Tenerife"
author: "Luis LÃ³pez-Manzanares"
date: "`r Sys.Date()`"
output:
  html_document:
    theme: flatly
    toc: true
    toc_depth: 2
    toc_float: true
    number_sections: true
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(
  echo = F,
  message = F,
  options(OutDec = ","),
  fig.dim = c(6, 5) # width = 6, height = 5 
  )
library(tidyverse)
library(lubridate)
```

```{r data-load}
ds <- read_delim("../data/raw/dataset-ISTAC-C00014A_000012-1.3-observations.tsv",
                 show_col_types = FALSE) %>% 
  rename_all(tolower) %>% 
  filter(
    territorio == "Tenerife",
    !is.na(obs_value)
    ) %>% 
  select(1,3,6) %>% 
  pivot_wider(
    names_from = medidas,
    values_from = obs_value
  ) %>% 
  select(1,2) %>% 
  mutate(
    year = str_sub(time_period, 1, 4),
#    year = factor(year, ordered = T),
    c_sem = str_extract(time_period, "\\d+$"),
    n_sem = as.numeric(c_sem),
    sem = str_c(
      year,
      c_sem
#      "1"  #dias, por si se lía lo de la semana
    ),
#    sem = factor(sem, levels = unique(sem)),
    .before = 1
  ) %>% 
  rename(
    pmp = `Precio medio ponderado`
  )


```

# Precio del plátano

```{r gr-precio-linea}
ggplot(ds, aes(n_sem, pmp, color = year)) +
#  geom_point(alpha = 0.3) +
#  geom_line()+
  geom_smooth(
    se = F,
    span = 0.8
    ) +
  labs(
    title = "Variación semanal del precio del plátano, ???/Kg",
    subtitle = "Precio medio ponderado",
    x = NULL,
    y = NULL,
    color = NULL
  ) +
  theme_light()

```
